title: Women tend to be 'risk-appropriate' investors, expert says: How that helps them in volatile markets
summary: Many studies show that women are more likely to adopt a conservative approach to investing. In times of market volatility, that tactic can pay off.

title: Ex-actor Nathan Chasing Horse jailed for at least 37 years for sexual assault
summary: The 49-year-old exploited his position as a spiritual leader to prey on Indigenous women and girls, the US court heard.

title: Founder of Shark Tank-backed startup Scholly sues his acquirer Sallie Mae
